metaTitle: Smoky Mountain Vacation Rental Management | Haven
metaDescription: Full-service Smoky Mountain vacation rental management for cabin owners in Sevier County. One flat fee, smart local pricing, five-star guest care. Book a call.
h1: Full-Service Vacation Rental Management in the Smoky Mountains
heroSubhead: One local team runs your cabin end to end across Sevier County, for one simple flat fee, so you earn more and do less.
introHeading: Property management built around your net revenue
introParagraphs: Haven manages cabins and vacation rentals across the Smoky Mountains for owners who want stronger returns without the daily firefighting. We are a local, full-service team, based right here in Sevier County since 2016, and we handle everything your property needs to perform: bookings and calendar across Airbnb, Vrbo, Booking.com, and direct; smart human pricing; professional marketing; inspected housekeeping; 24/7 guest communication; maintenance through trusted local trades; clean monthly statements; and the reviews that drive your ranking. All of it for one simple flat fee.

What matters to an owner is not gross bookings, it is what actually lands in your account after costs. We build everything around that number. The goal is higher occupancy at the right nightly rate, fewer wasted nights, lower friction on turnovers, and a guest experience strong enough that people rebook and refer. Across our portfolio that adds up to stronger revenue, better guest reviews, and fewer wasted nights. We will confirm what those figures look like for your specific cabin before you commit to anything.

This page is for cabin and vacation rental owners, and for investors weighing a purchase in the Smokies. If you own a home in Gatlinburg, Pigeon Forge, Sevierville, Wears Valley, or anywhere in or near Sevier County, and you want a manager who treats your property like their own rather than one listing in a portfolio of thousands, you are exactly who we built Haven for.
servicesIntro: Full-service means we run the entire operation, not just the parts that are easy. From the first guest inquiry to the final five-star review, one local team handles bookings, pricing, marketing, cleaning, guest care, and maintenance. You get one point of contact and one flat fee, with nothing buried in the fine print.
servicesDetail: Pricing is where most of the money is won or lost, and it is the area national managers get most wrong. An algorithm three time zones away cannot see that a rod run, a concert, a holiday weekend, or a wave of new listings down the road is about to move demand. Haven pairs revenue software with a real revenue manager who knows this market, adjusts your rates daily around events and seasonality, and protects your nightly rate instead of just discounting to fill the calendar. That balance of occupancy and average rate is what lifts net revenue, not bookings at any price.

Marketing and listing quality do the work before a guest ever arrives. Professional photography, listings written to convert, and distribution across every major channel put your cabin in front of more of the right travelers and earn the clicks that the booking platforms reward with better placement. Strong listings command higher rates, and higher rates compound across a full season. We treat your listing as a living asset and keep refining it, rather than setting it once and walking away.

Guest care is the engine behind all of it, and it is why we describe ourselves as guest-obsessed. We answer guests fast, day or night, so a small question never becomes a one-star review. Inspected, hotel-grade turnovers by vetted local cleaners mean every arrival meets expectations, and our maintenance team coordinates trusted local contractors to fix issues before they reach you or your guest. Five-star stays produce five-star reviews, and reviews are what drive ranking, repeat bookings, and the pricing power that grows your revenue over time.

Behind the scenes, the money side stays clean and boring, which is exactly how it should be. You receive clear monthly owner statements and reliable direct-deposit payouts, with no markups on cleaning and no surprise line items. You always know what you earned, what you paid, and why.
whyHeading: Why Smoky Mountain owners choose Haven
whyParagraphs: We are local by design, and in this market that is not a slogan. Haven has been owned and operated in the Smokies since 2016, so when a pipe needs attention, a guest is locked out at midnight, or a property needs eyes on it before a big arrival, we are minutes away, not a ticket in a queue at a national call center. That proximity shows up in faster fixes, fewer bad reviews, and a calendar that keeps earning.

It also shows up on your statement, because we charge one simple flat fee. There are no hidden booking fees, no markups on cleaning, and no nickel-and-diming. Paired with smart human pricing set by a revenue manager who actually knows Sevier County, that transparency is a large part of why Haven owners tend to run ahead of the market rather than wondering where their money went.

Most of all, we stay smaller on purpose so we can try harder. We manage a select group of homes well rather than thousands poorly, which means your property gets real attention, a guest experience worth five stars, and a team genuinely invested in your return. The results speak for themselves: 4.9 stars from more than 3,400 five-star reviews, and listings that rank in the top 1, 5, and 10 percent of Airbnb properties worldwide.
areasIntro: We manage cabins and vacation rentals across the Smoky Mountains. Choose your market below for local rates, the specific short-term rental rules that apply, and a realistic look at what your property can earn.
areasNote: We also manage homes in Townsend and around Knoxville. If your property is anywhere in or near Sevier County, we would love to talk, even if your town is not listed above.
feesHeading: How our fees work, and what owners earn
feesParagraphs: Haven charges one simple flat management fee, and that fee covers the full service: bookings, smart human pricing, marketing and photography, 24/7 guest communication, housekeeping coordination and inspected turnovers, maintenance, owner statements, and reputation management. There are no hidden booking fees, no markups on cleaning, and no nickel-and-diming. You always know exactly what you pay and exactly what you keep, which is rarer in this industry than it should be.

Owners ask the same fair question: will a manager earn me more than I net on my own or with someone cheaper? Across our portfolio, Haven cabins benefit from stronger pricing, better guest reviews, and revenue that runs roughly 30 percent ahead of the market. For many owners that lift more than covers the management fee and still leaves them ahead, while handing back their time. We treat these as honest portfolio figures, not a promise, and we will confirm realistic numbers for your specific property before you decide anything.

The wider market matters too. Heading into 2026, the Smoky Mountains average nightly rate sits around 321 dollars, roughly flat year over year, while new supply growth has cooled to about 1 percent (down from roughly 8 percent the prior year). In plain terms, there is no rising tide carrying every cabin upward anymore. The owners who win from here are the ones running a tight, professional operation, which is exactly what we do.

faqs.q: How does Haven's management fee work?
a: Haven charges one simple flat management fee, taken as a percentage of the revenue your property generates, so our incentives line up with yours: we only do well when you do well.

That single fee covers the entire full-service operation. There are no separate booking fees, no markups on cleaning, and no surprise line items on your statement. You always know what you pay and what you keep.

faqs.q: What can I realistically expect to earn?
a: Across our portfolio, Haven cabins benefit from stronger pricing, better guest reviews, and revenue that runs roughly 30 percent ahead of the market. That lift is driven by smart human pricing, strong listings, and a guest experience that earns repeat bookings.

Every home is different, so we treat those as honest portfolio figures rather than a guarantee. Before you commit, we will give you a realistic earnings estimate for your specific cabin, market, and amenities.

faqs.q: What does full-service management actually include?
a: Everything it takes to run your cabin well: listing and calendar management across Airbnb, Vrbo, Booking.com, and direct booking; daily revenue pricing; professional photography and marketing; 24/7 guest communication; inspected housekeeping and turnovers; maintenance through trusted local contractors; monthly owner statements with direct-deposit payouts; and reviews and reputation management.
You get one local point of contact and one flat fee. We take the day-to-day operation off your plate entirely.

faqs.q: How does switching to Haven work, and is it disruptive?
a: It is straightforward, and we handle the heavy lifting. First we evaluate your property, your market, and your numbers, and show you what the home can realistically earn under professional management.

Then we recommend the high-return improvements, photography, and amenities that move your listing up the rankings. From there we take over bookings, pricing, guests, cleaning, and maintenance. We coordinate the handoff around your existing reservations so guests are never caught in the middle.

faqs.q: How is Haven different from a national management company?
a: We are local and we are small on purpose. National managers run thousands of listings from far away and lean on an algorithm to set your rates. We are based in the Smokies, a real revenue manager who knows this market sets your pricing, and when something needs a person on-site we are minutes away.
Staying smaller lets us give your property genuine attention, which shows up in better reviews, higher occupancy, and net revenue that runs ahead of the market.

faqs.q: Who sets the nightly rates, software or a person?
a: Both, in the right order. We use revenue software to track demand, but a real Haven revenue manager who knows the Smoky Mountain market makes the calls, adjusting your rates daily around local events, seasonality, and supply.

That human judgment protects your average nightly rate instead of simply discounting to fill the calendar, which is what grows net revenue over a full season rather than just raising occupancy on paper.

faqs.q: Do you handle short-term rental rules and compliance?
a: Yes. Permits, inspections, taxes, and local zoning vary by city and by county across the Smokies, and we manage that piece for our owners so your cabin stays compliant and earning.
The specifics differ by market, which is why each city page covers the rules that apply where your property is located. Tell us where your home is and we will walk you through exactly what applies.

faqs.q: What kinds of properties does Haven manage?
a: We manage cabins and vacation rentals across Sevier County and the greater Smoky Mountains, from smaller homes to large group cabins, in Gatlinburg, Pigeon Forge, Sevierville, and Wears Valley, plus Townsend and around Knoxville.

We deliberately keep our portfolio selective so every home gets real attention. If you are an existing owner or an investor weighing a purchase, we are happy to give you a straight read on the property.

closingParagraph: Whether your cabin sits in Gatlinburg, Pigeon Forge, Sevierville, Wears Valley, or anywhere across Sevier County, the next step is a simple conversation. Book a no-pressure call with a local Haven advisor and we will give you a straight, data-backed look at what your property can earn under professional management, with no obligation and no sales pressure.
